mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room(building_id, room_name, bed_count, room_type, is_deleted) VALUES(#{buildingId}, #{roomName}, #{bedCount}, #{roomType}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE room
building_id = #{buildingId}, room_name = #{roomName}, bed_count = #{bedCount}, room_type = #{roomType},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE room SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM room WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT r.*, b.building_name as buildingName FROM room r LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.is_deleted = 0
SELECT r.*, b.building_name as buildingName FROM room r LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
SELECT r.*, b.building_name as buildingName FROM room r LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE r.building_id = #{buildingId} AND r.is_deleted = 0
